figures.caption: Figure 1: ROUTENLP architecture. The router assigns queries to model tiers; the cascade escalates uncertain responses (dashed red) with conformally calibrated thresholds; the co-optimization loop (dashed purple) improves cheaper models via targeted distillation on failure clusters.

Table 2: Main results (mean ± std, 5 seeds) volumeweighted across six tasks. Quality and Cost Ratios are computed relative to Always-T4. The p99 column is from the M/M/c queueing simulation under matched production load (Appendix J); the pilot empirical latency is reported separately in §6. Bottom: ablations.
